text.title: Agency Tiered-Proposal Template System Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: do not run this methodology; document skip rationale
use single-price productized SKU for smaller deals
rebuild as 3 tiers Good / Better / Best
spell out deliverables / hours / SLA / out-of-scope per tier
set 6-month minimum OR month-to-month with 20-30% premium
send proposal; track tier mix quarterly

text.example: preconditions=true → readiness gates evaluated → all_checks_pass==true → conclusion ref=six-month-minimum-commitment
